title: Minecraft: The Deep End
description: Explore the new Deep End dimension, striking an end stone frame portal with End Dust (fermented spider eye + eye of ender) to venture into the deep end. Mine Endium, create a full endium set, make a home and live in the Deep End.
body:
# Minecraft: The Deep End
Venture into the deep end and prepare for trouble! (and make it double!)
The Deep End adds a new dimension to the game, which is end themed!
You can mine a special new ore, called Endium, stronger than diamond. Create a tower of two Endium blocks, and top it with a Jack-o-lantern to summon a new boss known as The Shadow Of Yourself. Defeating this boss gives you the music disc of the main track, A City in the Sky.
So, my friend, what are you waiting for? Come and explore the Deep End, for it is your next adventure.


For Forge 1.12.2
Better performance with Optifine.

**H3Ls Note**
this is my first mod, so please leave reviews, criticism, in my Discord Server (linked below)

# CREDITS

H3LDLL: Developing the mod

PuzzlingGGG: composing "A City in the Sky"
